strengths: Strong full-stack and distributed-systems experience with event-driven architectures (e.g., GISCollective, Dunnhumby, re:cinq)
Practical involvement in AI-agent infrastructure (MCP, agentic workflows) at re:cinq
Proven track record of scaling engineering practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) in high-growth environments
concerns: Limited direct experience with fintech infrastructure (e.g., credit systems, payment flows, regulatory compliance)
No explicit record of leading multi-agent AI systems in production for commercial applications with financial consequences
Lacks demonstrated experience in hybrid engineering models with external delivery partners in regulated environments
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong technical versatility and leadership in distributed systems and AI-agent infrastructure, particularly in event-driven architectures and scalable engineering practices. However, his profile lacks direct fintech domain experience (e.g., credit risk, payment flows, regulatory compliance) and explicit production-scale multi-agent AI systems in commercial fintech contexts, which are critical for this role. His hybrid engineering governance experience is also not clearly documented.
